topic: fab init 启发式语义探索重构 — Check-not-Ask + 分层文档拓扑 + Matcha 交互

sources.summary: 17 files read, 3 gap sets per intent
9 findings, 8 best practices, 6 pitfalls, 6 codebase gaps from Claude Code docs + CLI UX literature

key_findings: Claude Code's new /init flow (explore → gap-fill → reviewable proposal → write) IS the Matcha pattern — fabric should mirror this architecture
Claude Code CLAUDE.md uses CONCATENATION (not nearest-wins) — root loads eagerly, subdirs lazy-load; this directly constrains physical topology design
.claude/rules/*.md with paths: frontmatter is the Claude-Code-native 'co-located without duplication' primitive — fabric should use this for cross-cutting concerns
forensic.json lacks structured assertions with confidence — recommendations_for_skill is string[], code_samples[].pattern_hint is bare string — primary refactor target for Check-not-Ask
SKILL allowed-tools includes Read/Glob/Grep/Bash but Phase 1/2 talk tracks never instruct their use — the tools are declared but not orchestrated
Current interaction burden: 7 user responses across 2 rounds (2 + 5) — target: 1 batch Check round with pre-accepted HIGH-confidence items
Hard rule 'NEVER infer unconfirmed invariants' conflicts with Matcha default-accept — needs redefinition: never WRITE unconfirmed, but DO display pre-accepted high-confidence for implicit acceptance
fab sync-meta only scans files named AGENTS.md — centralized cross-cutting docs (.fabric/agents/security.md) invisible; also does NOT maintain L0 <!-- fab:index --> → drift risk
Pitfall: file presence ≠ pattern adherence (tsconfig strict=false exists) — HIGH confidence requires DIRECT code evidence (grep count), not just file presence

Topology best-practice is HYBRID: scope-bound → co-located AGENTS.md (Claude concatenates ancestor chain); cross-cutting → .claude/rules/{concern}.md with paths: frontmatter (Claude loads on path match)

code_anchors.snippet: allowed-tools: Read, Write, Glob, Grep, Bash
code_anchors.significance: Tools declared but Phase 1/2 never invokes them — primary gap

code_anchors.snippet: Phase 1 展示摘要+提问; Phase 2 基于 recommendations_for_skill 提问
NEVER infer unconfirmed invariants; ask the user or omit the rule
code_anchors.significance: Hard rule conflicts with Matcha default-accept — needs redefinition
Pattern recognition exists but returns bare string — easiest upgrade point to add confidence

code_anchors.snippet: buildSkillRecommendations(): returns ['建议询问 Cocos 生命周期...', ...]
code_anchors.significance: Natural language suggestions — primary target to restructure as typed assertions with confidence + evidence
Schema primitives — need structured 'assertion' type with {type, statement, confidence, evidence[], proposed_rule?}
Cannot discover .claude/rules/*.md or .fabric/agents/*.md — blocks hybrid topology support

code_anchors.snippet: computeAgentsMeta() only recomputes hash — never touches L0 index block
code_anchors.significance: <!-- fab:index --> drift — sync-meta must either rewrite this block or emit @import lines

code_anchors.snippet: agentsMetaNodeSchema: { file, scope_glob, deps, priority, hash }
code_anchors.significance: No layer field, no topology_type — cannot record colocated vs rules-frontmatter
No topology_type field — SKILL cannot record hybrid decisions

chain: Phase 1: 展示摘要 + 提 1-2 问 (no source Read)
Phase 2: recommendations_for_skill → 提 3-5 问 (no source Read)
Phase 3: 写 init-context.json + AGENTS.md [+ group/AGENTS.md if domain_groups ≥ 2]

discussion_points: I1-DP1: recommendations_for_skill 升级为结构化 assertion[] — 每条含 {assertion, type, confidence, evidence[], proposed_rule?}
I1-DP2: SKILL Phase 1/2 重写为主动侦察模式 — 强制 Glob + Read 关键模式文件后，批量展示推断列表
I1-DP3: 三档置信度策略 — HIGH=pre-accept with note, MEDIUM=batch-confirm, LOW=always-ask with evidence gap disclosure
I1-DP4: HIGH 档必须有 DIRECT code evidence（grep 命中计数）— 仅靠文件存在不够
I2-DP1: 混合拓扑原则 — 作用域绑定约束用 co-located AGENTS.md，跨切面约束用 .claude/rules/{concern}.md with paths: frontmatter
I2-DP2: fab sync-meta 扩展扫描范围 — 识别 .claude/rules/*.md 并解析 paths: frontmatter；identify colocated vs rules-frontmatter
I2-DP3: L0 <!-- fab:index --> 维护权归属 — 方案 A: sync-meta 自动重写; 方案 B: 改为 @packages/*/AGENTS.md 系列的 @import 语法（Claude Code 原生解析）
I2-DP4: schema 扩展 — AgentsMetaNode 加 layer (L0/L1/L2) 和 topology_type (colocated|rules-frontmatter); InitContextDomainGroup 同步加 topology_type
I3-DP1: Phase 1+2 合并为单轮 'Architecture Review' 批量 Check — 减少用户回合数从 2 到 1
I3-DP2: 每个断言附 file:line 证据锚 — 用户 2 秒内可验证
I3-DP3: 硬规则重定义 — NEVER WRITE unconfirmed invariants, 但 DO DISPLAY pre-accepted high-confidence items for implicit acceptance
I3-DP4: 交互话术从 '请告诉我 X' 改为 '我看到 X (evidence: Y), 对吗?' — Check-not-Ask 语义
open_questions: Q1 (I1): HIGH 档置信度阈值具体值 — 0.9? 0.95? 基于什么量化指标 (文件覆盖率? grep 命中密度?)
Q2 (I1): SKILL 主动补采的文件数上限 — forensic 已采 5 文件×30 行，SKILL 再补多少? 按目录 top-3 还是按 pattern 补采?
Q3 (I2): 跨切面约束的初始集合 — security/testing/performance 是否在 fab init 时预创建 .claude/rules/ 骨架, 还是仅在用户显式提出时按需生成?
Q4 (I2): L0 索引机制选择 — sync-meta 重写 <!-- fab:index --> vs 改用 Claude-Code-native @import 语法 (后者 fab sync-meta 成为可选)
Q5 (I3): Matcha 批量 Check 的粒度 — Phase 1+2 合并 (一屏) vs 保留两轮但每轮批量
Q6 (I3): 当 SKILL 主动 Read 源码时，如何限制无关文件以控制 token 成本 — 预定义 pattern family? forensic 给出 candidate_files 清单?

technical_solutions.solution: ForensicReport schema 升级 — 增加 structured assertions 字段
technical_solutions.problem: SKILL 无法做 Check-not-Ask 因为 forensic 输出没有结构化、带置信度的断言
technical_solutions.rationale: CLI 端比 SKILL 端做语义推断便宜（无 LLM 成本）且可测试；SKILL 只需消费结构化输入做展示
alternatives: SKILL 自己从 snippet 重新推断（浪费 LLM tokens）
外置 pattern registry（增加复杂度）
technical_solutions.next_action: 在 Round 2 确认 assertion schema 字段与置信度评分公式

technical_solutions.solution: SKILL Phase 1+2 合并为单轮 'Architecture Review' + Phase 0 主动侦察
technical_solutions.problem: 当前 2 轮共 5-7 问耗时且分散；'先展示 forensic 再问' 不是 Matcha 范式
technical_solutions.rationale: Claude Code 新 /init 的 explore → gap-fill → reviewable proposal 流程验证了此模式；批量 Check 减少 round-trip
alternatives: 保留 Phase 1/2 但话术改为 Check-not-Ask (不减少回合)
technical_solutions.next_action: Round 2 设计 Phase 0/1 话术 + 批量 Check 的视觉结构

technical_solutions.solution: 混合拓扑原则 — colocated AGENTS.md (scope-bound) + .claude/rules/*.md paths-frontmatter (cross-cutting)
technical_solutions.problem: 现有 SKILL 只生成 AGENTS.md，无法表达跨切面约束；集中 .fabric/agents/ 不被 Claude Code 原生识别
technical_solutions.rationale: Claude Code 的 ancestor 链 concat + path-frontmatter 加载机制是原生支持；混合匹配'就近 vs 集中'的语义分化
alternatives: 单一 root 大文件（违反 300 行硬规则）
technical_solutions.next_action: Round 2 确认跨切面约束的初始集合 + sync-meta 扩展扫描逻辑

technical_solutions.solution: 三档置信度 + 硬规则重定义
technical_solutions.problem: HIGH-confidence 默认接受与 'NEVER infer unconfirmed' 硬规则直接冲突
technical_solutions.rationale: 区分 '写入 init-context.json' 和 '展示给用户'：前者要求显式确认，后者允许默认接受+批量纠错
alternatives: 放弃 Matcha 保持硬规则（保守，牺牲 UX）
放弃硬规则全 auto（不安全）
technical_solutions.next_action: Round 2 明确 HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW 的具体量化定义

findings: Claude Code's new /init is the direct parallel — use it as reference UX
npm init is the only canonical detect-then-default in CLI; all other scaffolders (create-vite, create-next-app) are blank-form
Claude Code CLAUDE.md concatenates ancestor chain (not nearest-wins) and lazy-loads subdirs
.claude/rules/*.md with paths: frontmatter = canonical cross-cutting primitive
best_practices: Frame as 'correct if wrong' not 'confirm each'
HIGH confidence requires DIRECT code evidence (grep count) not just file presence
codebase_gaps: forensic.json: bare-string suggestions → need structured assertions with confidence
SKILL: tools declared but unused → must orchestrate Read/Glob/Grep in Phase 0
sync-meta: scans only AGENTS.md → must extend to .claude/rules/*.md
L0 <!-- fab:index --> not maintained by sync-meta → drift risk
Hard rule conflicts with Matcha → needs 'DISPLAY vs WRITE' split
